ogTitle: Andamooka Station vs Andrews: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Andamooka Station and Andrews.
heading: Andamooka Station vs Andrews — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Andamooka Station, South Australia and Andrews, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Andamooka Station (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Andamooka Station or Andrews safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Andamooka Station has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Andrews scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Andamooka Station scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Andrews scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Andamooka Station or Andrews?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
